title: Register Flights with Estimated Times
description: The system shall allow a logged-in flight dispatcher to enter a flight number, origin, destination, and estimated departure time, registering the flight in the system with the provided estimated times.
rationale: This requirement enables accurate scheduling and coordination of airline operations by providing a means for dispatchers to input essential flight details promptly.
business_value: Accurate and timely registration of flights ensures that the airline can maintain efficient schedules, allocate resources effectively, and manage operations smoothly.

source.description: As a flight dispatcher I need to register flights with estimated times so that the airline can maintain accurate schedules and coordinate operations.

acceptance_criteria: The flight is registered in the system with the provided estimated times.
preconditions: I am a logged-in flight dispatcher.
postconditions: The system contains the newly registered flight with accurate estimated departure time.
edge_cases: Flight number already exists in the system
Non-standard time formats (e.g., HHMM instead of HH:MM)
dependencies: Airline database for storing flight information
Authentication and authorization system to ensure dispatcher access
Scheduling system to update schedules based on registered flights

interfaces.name: Flight Database
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the Flight Database to store flight information.

interfaces.name: Dispatcher Interface
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the Dispatcher UI for inputting flight details.

test_cases.description: Register a new flight with valid details.
test_cases.expected_result: Flight is registered in the system with accurate estimated departure time.

test_cases.description: Attempt to register a flight with an already existing number.
test_cases.expected_result: System displays error message and prevents duplicate entry.

test_cases.description: Input incorrect origin or destination codes.
test_cases.expected_result: System rejects the input and prompts for correct codes.
System converts the time to a standard format before registration.
